title: View Bin Statuses on the ACB System Overview Screen
summary: Use the ACB System overview screen in the System HMI to view the tilt-tray system layout and the color-coded status of each bin.
when_to_use: Use this reference procedure when an operator needs to access the ACB System overview screen and view the tilt-tray layout together with the color-coded status presentation for each bin.
not_for: Do not use this procedure to assign undocumented meanings to specific colors, because this source section states only that statuses are color-coded.
Do not use this procedure if the required ACB System overview screen is not available or does not display the tilt-tray layout or bin status indications as described.

responsibilities: Navigate to the ACB System overview screen using the documented path.
Observe the tilt-tray layout and the color-coded status shown for each bin.
Stop and escalate if the expected overview information is not displayed.

safety_notes: This candidate is marked support safe.
Use only the documented display concept from the source; do not infer or assign unsupported meanings to specific colors.

system_preconditions: The ACB System overview screen can be accessed through the documented SMALLS > ACB > ACB1 - AMT TT path.

visual_references.description: System HMI screen artifact associated with the ACB System overview screen and its access path.
Figure showing the ACB System Overview interface.
Legend associated with the ACB System Overview screen.

steps.title: Open the ACB System overview screen
steps.purpose: Access the correct System HMI screen used to view the tilt-tray layout and bin status display.
steps.instruction: On the System HMI, press "SMALLS," select "ACB" from the drop-down menu, then select "ACB1 - AMT TT" to open the ACB System overview screen.
steps.expected_result: The ACB System overview screen opens.
steps.healthy_condition: The ACB System overview screen is displayed and available for review.
steps.failure_condition: The ACB System overview screen does not open or the expected overview display is not shown.

actions.label: Navigate to ACB System overview
actions.exact_action: Press "SMALLS," select "ACB" from the drop-down menu, then select "ACB1 - AMT TT".

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The System HMI screen associated with the ACB System overview screen and the documented navigation path.
The ACB System Overview interface that should appear after navigation.

stop_or_escalate_if: The ACB System overview screen does not display as described.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: To access the ACB System overview screen, the user presses SMALLS, selects ACB from the drop-down menu, and then selects ACB1 - AMT TT.
Artifact appears on page 31 in section optisweep_operation_and_maintenance_manual_final_1_4_1_1_1_1_acb_system_overview_screen.

steps.title: Observe the tilt-tray system layout
steps.purpose: Confirm that the overview screen is presenting the system layout intended for operator reference.
steps.instruction: Observe the displayed ACB System overview screen and review the tilt-tray system layout shown on the screen.
steps.expected_result: The tilt-tray system layout is visible on the ACB System overview screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The screen shows the tilt-tray system layout.
steps.failure_condition: The screen does not show the tilt-tray system layout as described.

actions.label: Review tilt-tray layout
actions.exact_action: Observe the displayed tilt-tray system layout on the ACB System overview screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The overall tilt-tray system layout shown on the ACB System Overview screen.
The overview display associated with the ACB System screen showing system status information.

stop_or_escalate_if: The ACB System overview screen does not display the tilt-tray layout as described.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The ACB System overview screen shows the tilt-tray system layout and a color-coded status of each bin.
Figure 4-1 appears on page 32 in section optisweep_operation_and_maintenance_manual_final_1_4_1_1_1_2_building_overview_screen.

steps.title: Identify the color-coded status for each bin
steps.purpose: Use the overview display to see that each bin has a color-coded status indication.
steps.instruction: Review the bins shown on the ACB System overview screen and identify the color-coded status displayed for each bin.
steps.expected_result: Each bin on the overview screen shows a color-coded status indication.
steps.healthy_condition: Color-coded status indications are visible for the bins on the screen.
steps.failure_condition: Bin status indications are missing, unclear, or not displayed as color-coded on the screen.

actions.label: Inspect bin status colors
actions.exact_action: Identify the color-coded status shown for each bin.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Bins on the ACB System Overview screen and their displayed color-coded status indications.
The legend associated with the ACB System Overview screen for indicator reference.

stop_or_escalate_if: The screen does not display color-coded status indications for each bin.
You need to assign a specific meaning to a color that is not documented in this source section.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The ACB System overview screen shows the tilt-tray system layout and a color-coded status of each bin.
Figure 4-2 appears on page 32 in section optisweep_operation_and_maintenance_manual_final_1_4_1_1_1_2_building_overview_screen.

steps.title: Compare the displayed bin indications across the screen
steps.purpose: Understand the current status presentation across the ACB System overview using only the source-supported color-coded display concept.
steps.instruction: Compare the displayed bin indications across the ACB System overview screen to understand the current status presentation of each bin, using only the source-provided color-coded display concept.
steps.expected_result: The operator can review the current screen-wide presentation of bin statuses without applying unsupported interpretations.
steps.healthy_condition: The operator can visually compare bin indications across the screen and recognize that the display presents color-coded status information.
steps.failure_condition: The screen does not provide a usable overview of bin indications, or interpretation would require unsupported color meanings not provided in this source section.

actions.label: Compare bin indications
actions.exact_action: Compare the displayed bin indications across the screen to understand the current status presentation of each bin using only the source-provided color-coded display concept.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The overall ACB System overview display showing system status information across the screen.
The full ACB System Overview screen for comparing bin indications across the layout.

stop_or_escalate_if: The ACB System overview screen does not display the tilt-tray layout or bin status indications as described.
A decision would require assigning undocumented meanings to specific colors.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The ACB System overview screen shows the tilt-tray system layout and a color-coded status of each bin.
There are four overview screens that show color-coded statuses of the different areas of the system.

success_criteria: The ACB System overview screen is opened using the documented System HMI path.
The tilt-tray system layout is visible on the screen.
The color-coded status of each bin is visible on the screen.
The operator can compare displayed bin indications across the overview without relying on unsupported color interpretations.
healthy_conditions: The ACB System overview screen displays the tilt-tray system layout.
Each bin has a visible color-coded status indication.
The overview screen provides a usable visual presentation of bin statuses across the system.
failure_conditions: The ACB System overview screen does not open.
The tilt-tray system layout is not displayed.
Bin status indications are not shown as described.
Specific color meanings are needed but are not documented in this source section.
escalation_guidance: Stop and escalate if the ACB System overview screen does not display the tilt-tray layout or bin status indications as described.
Escalate if interpretation depends on specific color meanings not documented in this source section.
